welcome.subject: Welcome to Synthex! Let's get started
welcome.intro: We're excited to help you amplify your social media presence with AI-powered content optimization.
welcome.nextSteps: Here's what you can do next:
welcome.support: Need help? Our support team is here to assist you.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your Synthex password
passwordReset.intro: We received a request to reset your password for your Synthex account.
passwordReset.instruction: Click the button below to create a new password:
passwordReset.expiry: This link will expire in 24 hours for security reasons.
passwordReset.noRequest: If you didn't request this password reset, please ignore this email.
passwordReset.security: For security reasons, this link can only be used once.

notification.subject: {{subject}}
notification.footer: You can manage your notification preferences in your account settings.

campaignComplete.subject: Your campaign '{{campaignName}}' has completed
campaignComplete.stats: Here's a summary of your campaign performance:

planUpgrade.subject: Upgrade your Synthex plan for more features
planUpgrade.intro: You're getting great results with Synthex! Ready to unlock more powerful features?
planUpgrade.discount: Use code UPGRADE20 for 20% off your first month!

accountSecurity.subject: Security alert for your Synthex account
accountSecurity.intro: We detected some unusual activity on your account and wanted to let you know.
accountSecurity.action: If this was you, no action is needed. If not, please secure your account immediately.

trialExpiring.subject: Your Synthex trial expires in {{days}} days
trialExpiring.intro: Your Synthex trial is ending soon, but don't worry - you can continue enjoying all the benefits!
trialExpiring.achievement3: Saved {{hoursThree}} hours of content creation time
trialExpiring.support: Questions? Our team is here to help you choose the right plan.

common.unsubscribe: Don't want to receive these emails? You can unsubscribe here.
common.support: Need help? Contact us at support@synthex.social
common.viewInBrowser: View this email in your browser
